query: SELECT p.name, COUNT(a.id) as amenity_count FROM properties p LEFT JOIN property_amenities a ON a.propertyId = p.id GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user wPFtpuzcjTMQHQ6.root --database bn23yPpAqDW8FGGWUFqWsM --execute SELECT p.name, COUNT(a.id) as amenity_count FROM properties p LEFT JOIN property_amenities a ON a.propertyId = p.id GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.id;
